keyPointsSummary: Reported yes/no questions use 'if' or 'whether' + normal word order (not question order)
Reported WH questions keep the WH word but drop question order/question mark
Reported commands use told/ordered/asked + object + to + base verb
Negative commands use 'not to + base verb'

quickQuiz.hindi: उसने पूछा, "क्या तुम आ रहे हो?"
उसने पूछा कि क्या मैं आ रहा था।
quickQuiz.answer: He asked if I was coming.

quickQuiz.hindi: उसने पूछा कि मैं कहाँ रहता था।
उसने मुझे यह काम करने को कहा।
quickQuiz.answer: He told me to do this work.

quickQuiz.hindi: उसने मुझे यहाँ न आने को कहा।
quickQuiz.answer: She told me not to come here.

quickQuiz.hindi: उन्होंने पूछा कि क्या मैं तैयार था।
quickQuiz.answer: They asked if I was ready.

mustRememberRules: Reported yes/no questions use 'if' or 'whether' + normal word order (not question order)
Reported WH questions keep the WH word but drop question order/question mark
Reported commands use told/ordered/asked + object + to + base verb
Negative commands use 'not to + base verb'
